content: Lydia: Fucking snowstorm’s thicker than a troll’s cum—can barely see the damned path. false gods Righteousness virtue. Vigilant of Stendarr: gifts Lydia: Don’t you talk about MJR like that, you cow-faced zealot. Serana may be a liberal bloodsucker, but at least she knows her place—on her knees. You? You’d break a hip trying to spread your legs for a real man. Vigilant of Stendarr: Your Thane will rot in Oblivion with the rest of your heathen kin. And when the last Stormcloak falls, Stendarr’s justice will purify this land of your filthy altars and whore temples. Lydia: Oh, I’ll purify face with my greatsword, you sanctimonious cunt. MJR’s cock has done more for Skyrim than your entire pathetic order. Now fuck off before I carve your dogma into your corpse.
Vigilant of Stendarr: Your threats mean nothing, brute. But this storm is deepening, and I’ve no desire to freeze arguing with a heretic whore.
